title: Substance Abuse and Behavioral Disorder Counselors
description: Counsel and advise individuals with alcohol, tobacco, drug, or other problems, such as gambling and eating disorders. May counsel individuals, families, or groups or engage in prevention programs.

tasks.text: Complete and maintain accurate records or reports regarding the patients' histories and progress, services provided, or other required information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Counsel clients or patients, individually or in group sessions, to assist in overcoming dependencies, adjusting to life, or making changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess individuals' degree of drug dependency by collecting and analyzing urine samples.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Follow progress of discharged patients to determine effectiveness of treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct chemical dependency program orientation sessions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review and evaluate clients' progress in relation to measurable goals described in treatment and care plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities with courts, probation officers, community services, or other post-treatment agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop client treatment plans based on research, clinical experience, and client histories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Modify treatment plans to comply with changes in client status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate counseling efforts with mental health professionals or other health professionals, such as doctors, nurses, or social workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or implement follow-up or aftercare programs for clients to be discharged from treatment programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Intervene as an advocate for clients or patients to resolve emergency problems in crisis situations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend training sessions to increase knowledge and skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview clients, review records, and confer with other professionals to evaluate individuals' mental and physical condition and to determine their suitability for participation in a specific program.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Instruct others in program methods, procedures, or functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in case conferences or staff meetings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Act as liaisons between clients and medical staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide clients or family members with information about addiction issues and about available services or programs, making appropriate referrals when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train or supervise student interns or new staff members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel family members to assist them in understanding, dealing with, and supporting clients or patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with family members or others close to clients to keep them informed of treatment planning and progress.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or evaluate public education, prevention, or health promotion programs, working in collaboration with organizations, institutions, or communities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or direct other workers providing services to clients or patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
